summary: Comprehensive testing of Fit & Flex app after critical fixes. MAJOR SUCCESS: Onboarding form date validation issue completely resolved, workout variety significantly improved, sport-specific frequency fixed. Backend achieving 98.6% success rate with excellent performance.

minor_issues.issue: Variety score 0.60 (target ≥0.7) - improved from 0.26 but still below target
minor_issues.impact: Minor - workout variety much better than before with 30 unique exercises vs 13
minor_issues.details: Max repetition reduced to 2 (vs 6 before), sport frequency fixed to every 5 days

ui_bugs.issue: Fitness goal selection not registering clicks properly
ui_bugs.details: Cards appear clickable but selection state not updating, preventing plan generation

integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete full E2E flow due to fitness goal selection issue
integration_issues.details: Onboarding works perfectly, but fitness goal selection blocks dashboard access

passed_tests: CRITICAL FIX: Onboarding form date validation completely resolved
CRITICAL FIX: Sport-specific exercise frequency (every 5 days vs 18/20 days before)
CRITICAL FIX: Workout variety improved (30 unique exercises vs 13 before)
Exercise library (32 exercises with proper categories)
Required exercises present (push-ups, squats, lunges, hill climbing)
Achievement system (5 milestones with proper structure)
action_item_for_main_agent: 1) Fix fitness goal selection UI interaction - cards not registering clicks properly, preventing plan generation. 2) Minor: Consider further workout variety algorithm optimization to reach 0.7 variety score target (currently 0.60). 3) Test complete E2E flow after fitness goal selection fix.
